summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of Vargas y Zuniga law firm marketing site. All 16 requested scenarios passed end-to-end via Playwright on the public REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. Spanish default, EN/ES toggle + localStorage persistence (vyz-lang) across reload, sticky glass-nav header on scroll, smooth-scroll nav links and hero CTAs, philosophy pillars (01/02/03) and stats (0/1/2), practice areas accordion with default 'personas' open + single-open behavior + 8 litigios sub-items, both team cards with mailto links, contact info (phone +56 9 7987 3921, two emails on separate lines, address, hours), floating chat FAB + modal + close, contact-chat-cta triggering FAB, back-to-top, and mobile menu at 390px width. Zero console errors during the full flow.
critical_code_review_comments: PracticeAreas accordion: when collapsed, the inner items still render in DOM with gridTemplateRows '0fr' + opacity:0 but Playwright still reports them as visible. Functionality is fine (visually collapsed), but adding 'visibility:hidden' or 'aria-hidden' when collapsed would improve accessibility/SEO clarity.

FloatingChat.jsx contains a hard-coded Spanish placeholder string ('El chat se conectara en breve...') that is not translated when lang=EN. Consider moving it into translations.js under t.chat.placeholder.

Hero overline 'Estudio Juridico - Temuco, Chile - Fundado 2005' stays in Spanish format even in EN ('Law Firm - Temuco, Chile - Founded 2005' is in translations and IS used correctly - verified). No issue.
Header.jsx logo links to '#top' but smooth-scroll handler uses querySelector('#top') which resolves to the hero section (id='top') - working as intended.
Minor: Contact.jsx imports LanguageToggle and renders it in the footer in addition to header - duplicate but intentional dark-variant. No issue.
No data-testid on the language toggle buttons collectively, but lang-toggle-es and lang-toggle-en individual testids exist as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Site is a single-page marketing app at https://vargas-zuniga-legal.preview.emergentagent.com with sections: hero, philosophy (#estudio), areas (#areas), team (#equipo), contact (#contacto). All interactive elements have data-testid. Language persistence uses localStorage key 'vyz-lang'. There is NO backend integration and NO contact form (intentional - chat widget placeholder only). FloatingChat placeholder text in Spanish is not translated for EN - low priority but could be improved.
